name: scale_agent
description: Scale agent: serial + script to localhost:39109/scale

scripts.build:win: rm -rf dist && pkg index.js --targets node18-win-x64 --output dist/scale_agent.exe && mkdir -p dist/prebuilds/win32-x64 && cp node_modules/@serialport/bindings-cpp/prebuilds/win32-x64/node.napi.node dist/prebuilds/win32-x64/node.napi.node
